name: Cappuccino Assassino
lore:
Lore of Cappuccino Assassino
                                    


Copuccino Coffee Circle introduces a character known as an assassin, equipped with a knife and a unique limb. This character is renowned for their incredible speed, rumored to be swift enough to pursue the elusive Tripy Trophy that moves rapidly through the water. Additionally, Capuccina, the ballerina and spouse of this assassin, has a backstory that involves a childhood encounter with the fearsome Bombiri Crocodilo, which suggests that their origins may trace back to this very district.
Description original text
Original (Italian)
Cappu-cappu-cappuccino Assassino! Assassini cappuccini! Questo killer furtivo si infiltra tra i nemici approffitando de la notte. Attento, oddiatore di caffè! Se non bevi una tazza di cappuccino al mattino, è meglio non incrociare questo tizio.
Translation (English)
Cappu-cappu-cappuccino Assassino! Cappuccino assassins! This stealthy killer infiltrates enemies at night. Beware, coffee hater! If you don't drink a cup of cappuccino in the morning, you better not cross paths with this guy.
